Simple, Transparent Pricing

Start free with open source. Upgrade when you need real SEO data, programmatic scale, or multi-site management.

Open Source

Free

MIT License. Forever.

  • 5 pipeline modules (CLI)
  • Heuristic keyword analysis
  • Competitor crawling + SEO audit
  • Astro static site generation
  • VPS / Vercel / Cloudflare deploy
  • Design token extraction
  • Community GitHub support

Cloud

$79/mo

Real data. Real scale.

  • Everything in Open Source
  • DataForSEO integration (real SV, KD, CPC)
  • Programmatic SEO engine (up to 5000 pages/site)
  • AI agent orchestration (LangGraph)
  • One-click VPS deployment
  • 10 sites included
  • 2,000 AI credits/month
  • llms.txt + GEO optimization
  • Email support

Frequently Asked Questions

What counts as a "site"?

One domain with its own SEO strategy, design system, and deployment. Each site gets its own Astro project.

What are AI credits?

Credits cover LLM API costs (content generation, strategy, analysis). 2,000 credits = ~100 articles or ~500 programmatic pages.

Can I export my site?

Yes. The generated site is a standard Astro project. You own the code. No lock-in. No proprietary format.

Do I need my own server?

No. You can deploy to Vercel (free tier), Netlify, or Cloudflare Pages. If you want your own VPS, we support that too.

What's the difference from Byword or Surfer?

They generate content. We generate the entire site — SEO strategy, design, code, deployment — around that content.

Is the open source version limited?

No artificial limits. It just doesn't include the paid data APIs, agent orchestration, or SaaS dashboard. All code is MIT.

SEOplant
